title: Business Development Manager
description:
·       Identify, target, and secure new business opportunities to meet revenue objectives.

·       Develop and execute strategic plans to drive sales growth in existing and new markets.

·       Build and maintain strong relationships with clients

·       Identify and establish partnerships with banks, financial institutions, and other potential referral sources to enhance the company’s business pipeline.

·       Collaborate with stakeholders to design and implement joint initiatives.

·       Conduct market research to understand industry trends, competitor activities, and customer needs.

·       Use insights to recommend and develop innovative solutions to capture market opportunities.

·       Collaborate with internal teams to develop effective sales tools, presentations, and marketing materials.

·       Participate in product pitches, presentations, and negotiations with prospective clients.

·       Work closely with product, marketing, and operations teams to ensure seamless delivery of insurance solutions.

·       Provide feedback and insights from clients to inform product development and service enhancements.

·       Regularly review key metrics and adjust strategies to achieve business targets.

·       Interact with and build solid relationships with bankers and branch managers of our partners.

Job Requirements

·       Relevant experience in the insurance, financial services sector or related industry.

·       Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

·       Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

·       Knowledge of insurance products and the brokerage industry is highly preferred.

postedCompany.description:
Grandtag Financial Consultancy (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. is a leading licensed financial advisory firm in Singapore since 2007, with our headquarter established in Hong Kong since 1999. We are a licensed financial adviser registered with the Monetary Authority of Singapore.​
​
​
We provide financial advisory for affluent and high-net-worth clients in various markets across Asia. Our business success has been based on trusted relationships with global top-rated insurers to provide bespoke, efficient, and tailor-made solutions for our clients. ​

​
With a strong business base and strategic presence in two of Asia’s private banking business hubs – Hong Kong and Singapore, we are well positioned as a trusted partner to private banks, trustees, family offices, and external asset managers in offering legacy, insurance, and wealth planning solutions to meet the wealth protection needs of our clients.​
postedCompany.name: GRANDTAG FINANCIAL CONSULTANCY (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
